address: Klang Muang Road, Tambon Nai Mueang, Amphoe Muang, Khon Kaen 40000

description.en: Massive night market behind Fairy Plaza serving the most authentic Isaan street food in the city. Fiery som tum, juicy gai yang, sticky rice, larb, and fresh river fish in a bustling local atmosphere.
description.nl: Enorme nachtmarkt achter Fairy Plaza met de meest authentieke Isaan-streetfood van de stad. Vurige som tum, sappige gai yang, sticky rice, larb en verse riviervis in een bruisende lokale sfeer.

metaTitle.en: Khon Kaen Night Market - Top Attraction in Khon Kaen | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Khon Kaen Nachtmarkt - Top Attractie in Khon Kaen | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Discover Khon Kaen Night Market at Fairy Plaza. Authentic Isaan street food including som tum, gai yang and sticky rice.
metaDescription.nl: Ontdek Khon Kaen Nachtmarkt bij Fairy Plaza. Authentieke Isaan-streetfood waaronder som tum, gai yang en sticky rice.
